subcodes.title: The Declaration of Baha’u’llah
subcodes.first_line: From the beginning of His childhood Baha'u'llah was possessed of such astonishing qualities
subcodes.first_line_orig: جواب جمال مبارک از بدو طفولیت اطوار و آثار و گفتاری عجیب داشتند
